startCompanyId.title: Start company ID
startCompanyId.description: First numeric f_C value to test.

endCompanyId.title: End company ID
endCompanyId.description: Last numeric f_C value to test.

fTPR.title: f_TPR
fTPR.description: Time filter (e.g. r86400 for 1 day, r604800 for 1 week).

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of parallel browser pages (keep low for LinkedIn).

requestTimeoutSecs.title: Request timeout (seconds)
requestTimeoutSecs.description: Maximum time to wait for page load.
